response.original_title: Decían que aquí no había ná
response.overview: In 2024, Juan Carlos García took the Michelin Star Gala stage by surprise by wearing a T-shirt that read "They said there was nothing in Jaén". In less than seven years, the province that once went unnoticed now has five Michelin stars. This documentary follows their accounts in a musical and gastronomical journey like no other. The beauty of this land will be known.
response.tagline: The beauty of this land will be known.
response.title: Decían que aquí no había ná
